title: Legacy to creditor
doc_html:
Art. 1616.  Legacy to creditor

A legacy to a creditor is not applied toward satisfaction of the debt unless the testator clearly so indicates.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
